hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】Anthropic首席执行官警告网络“危险时刻”，因为人工智能暴露了数千个漏洞；【CRYPTO】Nvidia 以 3000 万股认股权证支持 AI 扩张，IREN 股价飙升；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：美国和伊朗在宣布休战期间交火。

items.title: Anthropic CEO warns of cyber ‘moment of danger’ as AI exposes thousands of vulnerabilities
items.summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei warned AI has created a narrow window for software firms, governments and banks to fix tens of thousands of vulnerabilities.
items.title_zh: Anthropic首席执行官警告网络“危险时刻”，因为人工智能暴露了数千个漏洞
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 首席执行官达里奥·阿莫迪 (Dario Amodei) 警告称，人工智能为软件公司、政府和银行修复数以万计的漏洞创造了一个狭窄的窗口。

items.title: IREN stock surges as Nvidia backs AI expansion with warrants tied to 30 million shares
items.summary: Alongside the AI infrastructure expansion, Nvidia took warrants that may eventually convert into a $2.1 billion stake in IREN.
items.title_zh: Nvidia 以 3000 万股认股权证支持 AI 扩张，IREN 股价飙升
items.summary_zh: 除了人工智能基础设施的扩张之外，Nvidia 还获得了认股权证，这些认股权证最终可能会转换为 IREN 价值 21 亿美元的股份。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Exchange Fire Amid a Declared Truce
items.summary: The U.S. military said it struck Iranian military facilities and other targets after, it said, Iran fired on U.S. warships in the Strait of Hormuz.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国和伊朗在宣布休战期间交火
items.summary_zh: 美国军方表示，在伊朗向霍尔木兹海峡的美国军舰开火后，美国军方袭击了伊朗的军事设施和其他目标。

items.title: Bitcoin bulls ‘approaching the ceiling’ near $85K resistance with $1.69B ETF inflow streak and macro tailwinds aligned: analysts
items.summary: Bitcoin trades near $81,000 after clearing key on-chain thresholds, with Glassnode flagging $85,200 as the next ceiling.
items.title_zh: 分析师称，随着 $1.69B ETF 资金连续流入和宏观利好，比特币多头接近 85K 美元阻力位“接近天花板”
items.summary_zh: 在突破关键的链上门槛后，比特币交易价格接近 81,000 美元，Glassnode 将 85,200 美元视为下一个上限。

items.title: JPMorgan says Strategy’s bitcoin buying could reach $30 billion this year at current pace
items.summary: Michael Saylor's Strategy has added 145,834 bitcoin worth around $11 billion so far this year, JPMorgan analysts noted.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，按目前的速度，Strategy 今年的比特币购买规模可能达到 300 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通分析师指出，今年到目前为止，Michael Saylor 的策略已增加了 145,834 个比特币，价值约 110 亿美元。

items.title: Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
items.summary: OpenAI expands Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber, helping verified defenders accelerate vulnerability research and protect critical infrastructure.
items.title_zh: 使用 GPT-5.5 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​ 扩展网络的可信访问
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过 GPT-5.5 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​ 扩展了网络可信访问，帮助经过验证的防御者加速漏洞研究并保护关键基础设施。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: Kalshi traders see odds rising that a U.S.-Iran nuclear deal will be reached by 2027
items.summary: It comes after Axios reported on Wednesday that the two countries were nearing a one-page memo to end their war.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为，美国与伊朗 2027 年达成核协议的可能性上升
items.summary_zh: 此前，Axios 周三报道称，两国即将签署一页备忘录来结束战争。

items.title: Ryan Cohen's mysterious bank letter backing GameStop's eBay bid reveals a big issue with deal
items.summary: The combined company would need to maintain an investment-grade credit profile, GameStop's mysterious financing letter said.
items.title_zh: 瑞安·科恩（Ryan Cohen）神秘的银行信件支持 GameStop 收购 eBay，揭示了交易中的一个大问题
items.summary_zh: GameStop 神秘的融资信称，合并后的公司需要保持投资级信用状况。

items.title: Whirlpool says Iran war causing 'recession-level industry decline.' The shares are down 12%
items.summary: "War in Iran resulted in recession-level industry decline in the U.S. as consumer confidence collapsed in late February and March," the company said.
items.title_zh: 惠而浦表示，伊朗战争导致“经济衰退级别的工业衰退”。股价下跌12%
items.summary_zh: 该公司表示：“随着消费者信心在二月底和三月崩溃，伊朗战争导致美国工业出现衰退水平。”

items.title: Asian Development Bank's $70 billion energy and digital infra push puts Southeast Asia center stage
items.summary: Southeast Asia to benefit significantly from Asian Development Bank's $70 billion new energy and digital infrastructure plan in Asia and the Pacific by 2035.
items.title_zh: 亚洲开发银行斥资 700 亿美元推动能源和数字基础设施建设，使东南亚成为焦点
items.summary_zh: 到 2035 年，东南亚将从亚洲开发银行在亚太地区 700 亿美元的新能源和数字基础设施计划中受益匪浅。

items.title: Goodbye quarterly earnings? Here's when traders believe this big change will happen
items.summary: Traders are evenly divided as to whether the change will happen by Jan. 1. That would be an unusually fast timeline for the commission.
items.title_zh: 告别季度收益？这是交易者相信这一重大变化将会发生的时候
items.summary_zh: 对于是否会在 1 月 1 日之前发生这一变化，交易员们意见不一。对于委员会来说，这将是一个异常快的时间表。

items.title: Apollo CEO Rowan warns of market correction, slams 'egregious' practices at rival insurers
items.summary: Apollo CEO Marc Rowan warned that markets face an elevated risk of unexpected shocks, saying he is positioning the firm defensively for an expected correction.
items.title_zh: 阿波罗首席执行官罗文警告市场调整，抨击竞争对手保险公司的“恶劣”做法
items.summary_zh: 阿波罗首席执行官马克·罗文（Marc Rowan）警告说，市场面临意外冲击的风险较高，并表示他正在为公司做好防御性调整，以应对预期的调整。

items.title: SEC advances Trump-backed proposal to end mandatory quarterly earnings reports
items.summary: The SEC formally proposed a rule change that would allow companies to file semiannual reports on a new form, 10-S, in place of the traditional quarterly10-Qs
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会推进特朗普支持的终止强制性季度收益报告的提案
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会 (SEC) 正式提议修改规则，允许公司以新表格 10-S 提交半年报，以取代传统的季度 10-Q 表格

items.title: Trump's 'irresponsible war' to blame for economic slowdown, German minister says
items.summary: Finance Minister Lars Klingbeil blamed the US president's "irresponsible war in Iran" for harming the Germany economy.
items.title_zh: 德国部长称特朗普的“不负责任的战争”是经济放缓的罪魁祸首
items.summary_zh: 财政部长拉尔斯·克林贝尔指责美国总统“不负责任的伊朗战争”损害了德国经济。

items.title: Rosenberg: Russia's Victory Day parade with no tanks a sign Ukraine war not going to plan
items.summary: For the first time in nearly two decades, there will be no military hardware, just soldiers during Saturday's parade in Moscow.
items.title_zh: 罗森伯格：俄罗斯没有坦克的胜利日阅兵表明乌克兰战争不会计划
items.summary_zh: 周六在莫斯科举行的阅兵式上，近二十年来第一次，将没有任何军事装备，只有士兵。

items.title: Fears of renewed Gaza war as Hamas disarmament talks stall
items.summary: Israeli media reports suggest Israel is preparing to resume fighting because of the impasse in talks with Hamas.
items.title_zh: 哈马斯裁军谈判陷入僵局，人们担心加沙战争会再次爆发
items.summary_zh: 以色列媒体报道称，由于与哈马斯的谈判陷入僵局，以色列正准备恢复战斗。

items.title: German Leaders Clash With Spy Chiefs Over Domestic Threat From Iran
items.summary: Intelligence agents have privately warned of the potential of hybrid attacks from Iran-linked groups. But political leaders, including Chancellor Friedrich Merz, have publicly played down the risk.
items.title_zh: 德国领导人因伊朗国内威胁与间谍头目发生冲突
items.summary_zh: 情报人员私下警告称，与伊朗有关的组织可能会发动混合攻击。但包括德国总理弗里德里希·梅尔茨在内的政治领导人公开淡化了这一风险。

items.title: In Hungary, Voters Exposed the Limits of China’s Ties to Orban
items.summary: Beijing depended on Hungary’s outgoing leader, Viktor Orban, to gain a toehold in Europe. A giant battery factory proved a step too far.
items.title_zh: 匈牙利选民暴露了中国与欧尔班关系的局限性
items.summary_zh: 北京依靠即将卸任的匈牙利领导人欧尔班·维克多(Viktor Orban)在欧洲站稳脚跟。事实证明，建立一个巨型电池工厂迈出了一步。

items.title: Israel Says It Killed a Hezbollah Chief Near Beirut, Testing the Truce
items.summary: The strike was the first near the Lebanese capital since a cease-fire that has curbed fighting but not halted it. Washington is pushing for a lasting peace, hoping it will ease diplomacy with Iran.
items.title_zh: 以色列称在贝鲁特附近杀死一名真主党首领，测试停战协议
items.summary_zh: 这是自停火协议以来黎巴嫩首都附近的首次袭击，停火协议虽然遏制了战斗，但并没有停止冲突。华盛顿正在推动持久和平，希望这能缓和与伊朗的外交关系。

items.title: Russia Ramps Up Threats Toward Ukraine Over Victory Day Parade
items.summary: Kremlin officials said a large strike on Kyiv would be “inevitable” if Ukraine disrupted the May 9 event, a prospect President Volodymyr Zelensky has appeared to allude to.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯在胜利日阅兵上加大对乌克兰的威胁
items.summary_zh: 克里姆林宫官员表示，如果乌克兰扰乱 5 月 9 日的活动，对基辅的大规模袭击将“不可避免”，总统泽连斯基似乎也提到了这一点。

items.title: Coinbax wins $20,000 PitchFest prize at Consensus Miami for stablecoin compliance
items.summary: Coinbax took the top spot at Consensus Miami with software built to add compliance controls to onchain payments.
items.title_zh: Coinbax 凭借稳定币合规性在迈阿密共识大会上赢得了 20,000 美元的 PitchFest 奖金
items.summary_zh: Coinbax 在迈阿密共识大会上凭借为链上支付添加合规控制的软件占据了榜首。

items.title: AI agents and large corporates will lead the next stablecoin boom, executives say
items.summary: Stablecoins are entering a new phase of adoption, with large corporations using them for cross-border treasury flows while AI agents begin using blockchain rails for autonomous payments, Bridge and Deus X Capital executives said at Consensus 2026.
items.title_zh: 高管们表示，人工智能代理商和大企业将引领下一次稳定币繁荣
items.summary_zh: Bridge 和 Deus X Capital 高管在 Consensus 2026 上表示，稳定币正在进入一个新的采用阶段，大公司将其用于跨境资金流动，而人工智能代理开始使用区块链轨道进行自主支付。

items.title: Tether executive warns the 2026 midterms could have 'seismic impact' on crypto industry
items.summary: Jesse Spiro, Head of Government Affairs at Tether, said at Consensus Miami 2026 that the midterms will be a key test for whether crypto’s recent policy gains in Washington can survive politically.
items.title_zh: Tether 高管警告 2026 年中期选举可能对加密货币行业产生“巨大影响”
items.summary_zh: Tether 政府事务主管 Jesse Spiro 在 2026 年迈阿密共识大会上表示，中期选举将是华盛顿近期加密货币政策进展能否在政治上生存的关键考验。

items.title: Benchmark calls Bitdeer ‘comparatively inexpensive’ as it reiterates $27 price target for BTDR shares
items.summary: Bitdeer’s AI cloud ARR hit $43 million as of end-March, a 105% jump month-over-month, as its self-mining hashrate continues to grow.
items.title_zh: Benchmark 重申 BTDR 股票 27 美元的目标价，称 Bitdeer“相对便宜”
items.summary_zh: 截至 3 月底，Bitdeer 的 AI 云 ARR 达到 4300 万美元，环比增长 105%，自挖矿算力持续增长。

items.title: Crypto ETF boom continues with debut of first fund to track Canton
items.summary: A new crypto exchange-traded fund has entered the chat — the 21shares Canton Network ETF made its debut on Nasdaq Thursday.
items.title_zh: 首只跟踪 Canton 的基金首次亮相，加密货币 ETF 热潮持续
items.summary_zh: 一种新的加密货币交易所交易基金已加入讨论——21shares Canton Network ETF 周四在纳斯达克首次亮相。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Firo (FIRO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #872.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Firo (FIRO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#872。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #510.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Nillion (NIL)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#510。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #701.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：wojak (WOJAK)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#701。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Jito (JTO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #158.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Jito (JTO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 158 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Terra Luna Classic (LUNC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #108.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Terra Luna Classic (LUNC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 108。

items.title: Singular Bank helps bankers move fast with ChatGPT and Codex
items.summary: Singular Bank built Singularity, an internal assistant using ChatGPT and Codex to help bankers save 60–90 minutes daily on meeting prep, portfolio analysis, and follow-up.
items.title_zh: Singular Bank 通过 ChatGPT 和 Codex 帮助银行家快速行动
items.summary_zh: Singular Bank 使用 ChatGPT 和 Codex 构建了 Singularity，这是一款内部助手，可帮助银行家每天在会议准备、投资组合分析和跟进方面节省 60-90 分钟的时间。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: Bitmine to slow down ether purchases as it nears accumulation goal, Tom Lee says
items.summary: At the current pace of purchases, Lee said his Ethereum treasury giant would reach its 5% ether accumulation goal in six weeks, then shift its focus to staking and share buybacks.
items.title_zh: 汤姆·李（Tom Lee）表示，比特矿场将在接近积累目标时放慢以太币购买速度
items.summary_zh: Lee 表示，按照目前的购买速度，他的以太坊财务巨头将在六周内达到 5% 的以太币积累目标，然后将重点转向质押和股票回购。

items.title: Dorsey’s Block raises full-year guidance after ‘strong’ Q1, records $173 million bitcoin remeasurement loss
items.summary: Cash App's bitcoin business was down 31% year-over-year, while Square reported a negligible gross profit impact from crypto.
items.title_zh: Dorsey’s Block 在“强劲”第一季度后上调全年指引，比特币重新计量损失达 1.73 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Cash App 的比特币业务同比下降 31%，而 Square 报告称加密货币对毛利润的影响可以忽略不计。

items.title: JPMorgan says bitcoin is gaining over gold as debasement trade after Iran conflict
items.summary: Investors are increasingly choosing bitcoin over gold as a debasement trade since the Iran conflict began, JPMorgan analysts said.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，伊朗冲突后，随着贬值交易，比特币正在超越黄金
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通分析师表示，自伊朗冲突爆发以来，投资者越来越多地选择比特币而不是黄金作为贬值交易。

items.title: Parloa builds service agents customers want to talk to
items.summary: Parloa leverages OpenAI models to power scalable, voice-driven AI customer service agents, enabling enterprises to design, simulate, and deploy reliable, real-time interactions.
items.title_zh: Parloa 建立客户想要交谈的服务代理
items.summary_zh: Parloa 利用 OpenAI 模型为可扩展、语音驱动的 AI 客户服务代理提供支持，使企业能够设计、模拟和部署可靠的实时交互。

items.title: Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API
items.summary: Explore new realtime voice models in the OpenAI API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, enabling more natural and intelligent voice experiences.
items.title_zh: 利用 API 中的新模型推进语音智能
items.summary_zh: 探索 OpenAI API 中新的实时语音模型，该模型可以推理、翻译和转录语音，从而实现更自然、更智能的语音体验。

items.title: How frontier firms are pulling ahead

items.title: Introducing ChatGPT Futures: Class of 2026

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in April 2026

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.

items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Uber and Disney are seeing the same remarkable dynamic in this economy. Both stocks are surging
items.summary: Uber and Disney pointed to a resilient spending backdrop, with consumers continuing to shell out for rides, food delivery, vacations and theme park trips.

items.title: Trump gives 4 July ultimatum to EU to approve trade deal with US

items.title: Privacy and accountability can coexist onchain, say panelists at Consensus Miami
items.summary: Public blockchains make transactions traceable, but that transparency can come at the expense of user privacy. Speakers from Moody’s Ratings and ChangeNOW said that hybrid blockchain architecture and address-level monitoring can help solve both problems simultaneously.
items.title_zh: 迈阿密共识小组成员表示，隐私和责任可以在链上共存
items.summary_zh: 公共区块链使交易可追溯，但这种透明度可能会以牺牲用户隐私为代价。穆迪评级和 ChangeNOW 的发言人表示，混合区块链架构和地址级监控可以帮助同时解决这两个问题。

items.title: Coinbase stock declines 5% after missing Q1 estimates on crypto slowdown
